author: yufengli
name: LeakyReLU² + 4ep Legal TTT + Parallel Muon
blurb: Minimal improvement on 2026-03-23_LeakyReLU_LegalTTT_ParallelMuon: increase legal score-first TTT from lr=0.002/3ep to lr=0.0025/4ep, and skip diagnostic pre-TTT evals to keep total eval under 10 minutes. Training stack unchanged (11L, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, BigramHash(1536), XSA4, partial RoPE, VE128, EMA, tight SWA, GPTQ-lite int6, Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon).
